title: SBI Crypto - Rekt
relevance_summary: Multi-chain coordinated outflows via instant exchanges and Tornado Cash

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to Tornado Cash within 24 hours of an instant exchange transfer

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT SENDS FUNDS TO TORNADO_CASH WITHIN 24 HOURS OF AN INSTANT_EXCHANGE_TRANSFER
summary: SBI Crypto lost $24 million across five blockchains through coordinated outflows via instant exchanges and Tornado Cash. A guard could have detected and blocked these transactions by monitoring for instant exchange transfers followed by Tornado Cash deposits within 24 hours.
